market_question: Will Brazil beat Mexico in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?
clip_description: Brazil vs Mexico pregame warmup + press conference clip

frame_observations.observation: Brazil players warming up at high intensity, no visible players sitting out or holding injuries.
Vinicius Jr performing sprint drills at full pace. Appears physically sharp.
Mexico's Lozano seen jogging at reduced pace during warmup, receiving treatment from physio staff on right calf.
Brazil coach addressing players in huddle. Body language appears confident and organized.
Mexico goalkeeper practicing shot-stopping. Distribution looks sharp.
